message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry-operator: Finalizer in the open telemetry collector CustomResource mission (#1574)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-operator-4367-finalizer-in-the-open-telemetry-collector-customreso",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-operator: Finalizer in the open telemetry collector CustomResource prevents successful namespace deletion when managed operator is uninstalled prior to CustomResource uninstall/deletion",
+    "description": "Finalizer in the open telemetry collector CustomResource prevents successful namespace deletion when managed operator is uninstalled prior to CustomResource uninstall/deletion. This issue affects 14+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify opentelemetry-operator troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your opentelemetry-operator deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-operator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator\n```\nWhen opentelemetry operator and Custom Resource(operand) installed separately, whenever OpenTelemetry Collector custom resource( CR) gets created/modifies, the opentelemetry collector controller adds the finali"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Finalizer in the open telemetry collector CustomResource…",
+        "description": "- Add finalizers to CR only when cluster roles and bindings for SA are created by Operator\n- Caused by #2938\n\n<Issue number if applicable>\n\n- Resolves: #4367\n```yaml\n> kubectl get ns\n\nNAME                          STATUS        AGE\ndefault                       Active        6h31m\ngke-managed-cim               Active        6h29m\ngke-managed-system            Active        6h29m\ngke-managed-volumepopulator   Active        6h29m\ngmp-public                    Active        6h28m\ngmp-system                    Active        6h28m\nkube-node-lease               Active        6h31m\nkube-public                   Active        6h31m\nkube-system                   Active        6h31m\nfoo                        Terminating   6h28m\n\n> kubectl describe ns/foo\n\nName:    \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Finalizer in the open telemetry collector… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- Add finalizers to CR only when cluster roles and bindings for SA are created by Operator\n- Caused by #2938\n\n<Issue number if applicable>\n\n- Resolves: #4367",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> kubectl get ns\n\nNAME                          STATUS        AGE\ndefault                       Active        6h31m\ngke-managed-cim               Active        6h29m\ngke-managed-system            Active        6h29m\ngke-managed-volumepopulator   Active        6h29m\ngmp-public                    Active        6h28m\ngmp-system                    Active        6h28m\nkube-node-lease               Active        6h31m\nkube-public                   Active        6h31m\nkube-system                   Active        6h31m\nfoo                        Terminating   6h28m\n\n> kubectl describe ns/foo\n\nName:         foo\nLabels:       kubernetes.io/metadata.name=foo\nAnnotations:  <none>\nStatus:       Terminating\nConditions:\n  Type                                         Status  LastTransitionTime             "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace",
+      "Role"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/issues/4367",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/pull/4574"
+    },
+    "reactions": 14,
+    "comments": 1,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-20T06:31:39.261Z",

+}
